Page must not throw any uncaught JS error after full hydration.
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.

What this test was checking
Page must not throw any uncaught JS error after full hydration — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: about_us, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/about, us.
Test data used
params: [about_us, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/about, us]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use these parameters: about_us, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/about, us
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Page must not throw any uncaught JS error after full hydration.
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
